data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

For 7 days from 12/13 (Tue), rewards dropped in Scrimmages will be doubled.
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 12/13 (Tue) 2:00 – 12/19 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
